mapper.select: select code_id as CODE_ID, group_code as GROUP_CODE, code_value as CODE_VALUE, code_name as CODE_NAME, description as DESCRIPTION, is_deleted as IS_DELETED, version as VERSION, created_at as CREATED_AT, created_by as CREATED_BY, updated_at as UPDATED_AT, updated_by as UPDATED_BY from common_codes_51 where code_id = #{codeId} and is_deleted = 'n'

select code_id as CODE_ID, group_code as GROUP_CODE, code_value as CODE_VALUE, code_name as CODE_NAME, description as DESCRIPTION, is_deleted as IS_DELETED, version as VERSION, created_at as CREATED_AT, created_by as CREATED_BY, updated_at as UPDATED_AT, updated_by as UPDATED_BY from common_codes_51 where is_deleted = 'n' order by group_code asc, code_id asc

select code_id as CODE_ID, group_code as GROUP_CODE, code_value as CODE_VALUE, code_name as CODE_NAME, description as DESCRIPTION, is_deleted as IS_DELETED, version as VERSION, created_at as CREATED_AT, created_by as CREATED_BY, updated_at as UPDATED_AT, updated_by as UPDATED_BY from common_codes_51 where group_code = #{groupCode} and is_deleted = 'n' order by code_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into common_codes_51 ( group_code, code_value, code_name, description, is_deleted, version, created_at, created_by ) values ( #{groupCode}, #{codeValue}, #{codeName}, #{description}, #{isDeleted}, #{version}, #{createdAt}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: update common_codes_51 set group_code = #{groupCode}, code_value = #{codeValue}, code_name = #{codeName}, description = #{description}, version = #{version} + 1, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where code_id = #{codeId} and version = #{version} and is_deleted = 'n'
